notes: Rough silhouette of mantle and arm cluster is present but the long tentacles are missing, arms read as blobby leaves, and a stray rectangular trace artifact contaminates the image.
specific_issues: both long tentacular clubs from the photo are missing
stray rectangular box artifact under the head/arms breaks the silhouette
arms rendered as fused leaf-like lobes rather than discrete arms with suckers
two eyes drawn though only one is visible in the photo
stipple is uniformly random noise instead of concentrated chromatophore fields
no ring suckers shown on arms
fin-mantle outline is wavy and imprecise compared to the photo's clean rhomboid fin
overall reads as a noisy photo-trace, not an FAO plate
